# BP-132 positive: an optimistic-lock UPDATE ignores whether a row matched.
lang: go
file: BP-132-vulnerable.go
variant: database-sql-version-update
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func updateUser(db *sql.DB, id, version int) error {
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE users SET name = ?, version = version + 1 WHERE id = ? AND version = ?", "Ada", id, version)
	return err
}
